en.intro: Primitive X is guided by the Chinese educational philosophy of “rote memorization → deep understanding → generalization by analogy.” We build productive entry-level robotic workers that generate real-world economic value through memorization-based learning; they evolve into single-domain experts through self-learning in practice, and ultimately generalize their capabilities by analogy—acting as correctors for future general-purpose agents and serving as intelligence primitives that seamlessly augment other agents and human workflows.
en.introRepoHtml: Welcome to visit our CODE HOMEPAGE.
en.emptyHelp: Add JSON files under {path} and reload.

joinUs.title: Join ARM
joinUs.company: We focus on developing robotic intelligence systems.
joinUs.contactTemplate: Contact me ({researchHead} or {projectLeader}) if you want to join our team or have any other questions.

zh.intro: Primitive X 受中国教育哲学 “机械记忆 → 深入理解 → 举一反三” 的启发。我们首先打造一批入门级机器人工作者，通过基于记忆的学习方式进入真实生产环境，在工厂中创造实际经济价值；接着在持续的实践过程中不断积累环境交互数据，从重复执行中归纳任务的深层结构与规律，由机械复现逐步走向对任务本质的理解，进化为单一领域专家；最终，通过对单一领域本质的掌握激发举一反三的能力——即使面对未见过的场景仍能自主有效应对：既可作为未来通用智能体系统的纠错器，也可作为智能基础单元无缝嵌入其他智能体与人类工作流，实现能力增强与协同扩展。
